title: Masters Defense
summary: You use protective equipment and practiced techniques to avoid becoming hurt in a fight.
tiers: Tier 3: Dodge and Resist or Dodge and Respond
Tier 6: Defense Master or Wear It Well
gm_intrusions: Shields break when hit, as do weapons used to parry. Armor straps break.
